title: 2026 Golden Globes: Major Winners and Surprises
text: The Golden Globes celebrated Hollywood's finest on Sunday, with several standout performances across film and television categories. Paul Thomas Anderson's One Battle After Another emerged as the clear victor in comedy/musical films, securing best picture, directing, and writing awards. The film also earned Teyana Taylor recognition as best supporting female actor. In the drama category, Hamnet claimed the top prize and best female actor for Jessie Buckley. The biggest upset came when Wagner Moura won best male actor in drama for the Brazilian film The Secret Agent. Adolescence continued its award momentum by sweeping all four of the limited series categories it was nominated for, including best limited series and acting honors for Owen Cooper, Erin Doherty, and Stephen Graham. The Pitt took best drama series, with Noah Wyle earning best male actor. The Studio won best musical/comedy series with Seth Rogen as best male actor in that category. The ceremony made history by awarding its inaugural Best Podcast honor to Good Hang With Amy Poehler, expanding recognition beyond traditional film and television mediums. Other notable winners included Ryan Coogler's Sinners for cinematic and box office achievement, and KPop Demon Hunters for best animated film and best song.
